allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@152.42.248.236 "echo ''=== RUNNING SERVICES ==='' && systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running --no-pager | grep -E ''django|gunicorn|nginx|docker|uvicorn|celery|redis|postgres|rag'' && echo ''=== DOCKER CONTAINERS ==='' && docker ps --format ''table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}\\t{{.Ports}}'' 2>/dev/null || echo ''Docker not running'' && echo ''=== LISTENING PORTS ==='' && ss -tlnp | grep -E '':\(80|443|8000|8001|8002|8003|8080|5432|6379|3000\)''")

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@152.42.248.236 "echo ''=== NGINX CONFIG ==='' && cat /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default 2>/dev/null || cat /etc/nginx/nginx.conf 2>/dev/null | head -100 && echo ''=== API ENDPOINTS ==='' && cat /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/* 2>/dev/null | grep -E ''location|proxy_pass|upstream'' | head -50")
